title: Using mirrored dates in automations

posts.author: Jeannot (Jeannot Damoiseaux)
posts.cookedHtml:
Dear,

Today I noticed that it is not possible to use dates from mirrored columns in automations. Including this feature would allow for making more complex automations based on relationships with items in other boards.

Let me know if you would like to see this incorporated as well!

Regards,

Jeannot

posts.author: hmichaud (Hubert Michaud)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I would be interested to see that feature too.

I want to use a date in a database that can be modified automatically in an other board.

Thanks!

posts.author: Cailin88 (Cailin Barrett-Bressack)
posts.cookedHtml: This would be a huge help for me as well! It’s important for google calendar integration specifically.

posts.author: mygl (Madeleine)
posts.cookedHtml: Can confirm, would help a lot with our scheduling

posts.author: mbetancur (Maria Betancur)
posts.cookedHtml: Has there been an update on this request? or at least an app for integrations besides autoboost?

posts.author: EmilyTLP (Emily Havener)
posts.cookedHtml: I would also find this helpful. It honestly seems like a pretty obvious implementation.
